{{Quote|I was one of the ground troops. We fought on Dagary Minor together. It was near the beginning of the war. We, uh, we didn't win that battle.|[[Xaart]], to the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
A '''battle''' occurred on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dagary Minor]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]], in [[3963 BBY]].<ref name="Atlas" /> It was one of many early losses for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as it struggled to fend off the invading [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]].

The [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi general]] that would come to be known as the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] participated in the battle. She and a fellow Republic war veteran named [[Xaart]] briefly reminisced about the battle in [[3951 BBY]].
